name: Clown Clan Flair
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>道化の一座</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>クラウン・クラン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> フレア
desc:
You can Ritual Summon this card with a "Clown Clan" card. You can reveal this card in your hand; add 1 "Clown Clan" card from your Deck to your hand, except a Ritual Monster, then discard 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Clown Clan Flair" once per turn. If this card is Tributed: You can activate 1 of these effects (but you can only use each of these effects of "Clown Clan Flair" once per turn);
● Shuffle all Ritual Monsters on the field and in the GYs into the Deck.
● Change 1 Effect Monster on the field to face-down Defense Position.
